---
title: "Salience of Fakeness: Experimental Evidence on Readers’ Distinction between Mainstream Media Content and Altered News Stories"
author: "Maniou Th., Papa, V., and Bantimaroudis, Ph."
date: 2020-01-01
description: "Journal of Communication: Media Watch, 11 (3), 386-400."
categories: [Public Opinion and Argument Mining]
image: images_publications/journal-article.png
---
